title: Month-End Close: Pull Data from QuickBooks or Xero
description: Set up a Claude Cowork skill that connects to your accounting software and pulls the data you need for month-end close automatically.

steps.title: Install Claude Cowork and get the QuickBooks or Xero MCP
steps.content: Download the Claude desktop app and subscribe to a paid plan. Then install the pre-built MCP connector for QuickBooks Online or Xero — this lets Claude talk directly to your accounting system.

steps.title: Create a Cowork skill called "Pull GL Data"
steps.content: Write a markdown file that instructs Claude to connect to your accounting software, pull the trial balance, general ledger detail, and any sub-ledger data you need for close. Specify the date range and which accounts to include.

steps.title: Test the data pull and verify completeness
steps.content: Run the skill and check that the output matches what you'd get from a manual export. Confirm account totals tie to your TB, and that the date range is correct. Fix any gaps in the skill instructions.
